name: CENTCOMM Command & Control Center
description: Build a Next.js command and control center for NanoClaw with dashboard, agents panel, memory vault, kanban board, and teams management

tasks.name: Initialize Next.js project with shadcn/ui
tasks.description: Create Next.js 15 App Router project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Install core dependencies: better-sqlite3, zustand, recharts. Set up dark command center theme.

tasks.name: Create app layout with sidebar navigation
tasks.description: Build the main layout with a collapsible sidebar. Nav items: Dashboard, Agents, Memory, Kanban, Teams. Dark theme with #0a0a0f bg, blue accent. Add header with CENTCOMM branding and system status indicator.

tasks.name: Build data access layer
tasks.description: Create server-side services: SQLite reader (better-sqlite3 connecting to ../store/messages.db), JSON config reader (registered_groups.json, router_state.json), and markdown file reader (groups/{folder}/*.md). Build API routes for each data source.

tasks.name: Build Dashboard page
tasks.description: Dashboard with system overview cards: active groups count, scheduled tasks (active/paused/completed/failed), active teams, total messages. Add a recent activity feed showing latest messages and task runs. Use real data from SQLite via API routes.

tasks.name: Validate Phase 1
tasks.description: Start the dev server, verify dashboard loads with real data from SQLite. Check all cards show correct counts, activity feed works. Fix any issues.

tasks.name: Build Agents Panel
tasks.description: Agents page with cards for each registered group. Show: name, folder, trigger, last activity time, message count, task count. Add click to expand agent detail view with message history and memory file listing.

tasks.name: Build Memory Vault
tasks.description: Memory page with tree view file browser for each group's files (SOUL.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md, memory/*.md, conversations/*). Add markdown renderer panel. Add full-text search using memory_chunks_fts table.

tasks.name: Validate Phase 2
tasks.description: Verify agents panel shows all 5 groups with correct stats, agent detail works. Verify memory vault can browse all group files, render markdown, search works. Fix any issues.

tasks.name: Build IPC writer service
tasks.description: Create server-side IPC writer that writes JSON task files to ../data/ipc/{group}/tasks/ and message files to ../data/ipc/{group}/messages/. Support operations: schedule_task, pause_task, resume_task, cancel_task, send_message. Add API routes for each action.

tasks.name: Build Kanban Board
tasks.description: Kanban page with columns: Active, Paused, Completed, Failed. Task cards show prompt preview, schedule type/value, next_run, last_result snippet. Add @dnd-kit drag-and-drop between columns that triggers IPC (pause/resume/cancel). Add task detail panel with run history from task_run_logs. Add create task dialog and group filter.

tasks.name: Validate Phase 3
tasks.description: Verify kanban shows all scheduled tasks in correct columns. Test drag-and-drop writes correct IPC files. Test create task dialog. Verify task detail shows run history. Fix any issues.

tasks.name: Build Teams Dashboard
tasks.description: Teams page with active/completed teams list. Team cards show name, status, member count, task count. Team detail view with member roster (name, model, role, status), task board, and inter-team message log. Add create team and spawn teammate dialogs via IPC.

tasks.name: Build Council Meeting & Agent Chat
tasks.description: Council Meeting mode: select multiple agents, input prompt, broadcast to all via IPC, display response area for each agent. Agent chat interface: select a group, type message, send via IPC message file. Show sent messages in a log.

tasks.name: Validate Phase 4
tasks.description: Verify teams dashboard shows all teams with correct data. Test team detail view. Test council meeting writes IPC files to all selected groups. Test agent chat. Fix any issues.

tasks.name: Add SSE real-time updates
tasks.description: Create SSE endpoint at /api/events that polls SQLite for changes (new messages, task status changes, team updates) and streams events to connected clients. Add useEventSource hook. Wire into dashboard, activity feed, kanban, and teams for auto-refresh.

tasks.name: Add metrics charts and polish
tasks.description: Add Recharts visualizations: task success rate over time, messages per day per group, team completion rates. Add proper loading states, empty states, and error handling throughout. Ensure responsive layout. Final UI polish.

tasks.name: Final end-to-end validation
tasks.description: Complete validation: start app, verify all 5 pages work with real data. Test all IPC write operations. Test SSE updates. Check responsive layout. Verify no console errors. Send final status report.
